prompt_latex: In a geometric sequence of positive terms, $a_{2}=3$ and $a_{6}=243$. Find $a_{4}$.
solution_latex: Because $4$ is halfway between $2$ and $6$, $a_{4}^2=a_{2}a_{6}$. Thus $a_{4}=\sqrt{3\cdot 243}=27$.
